vocab.example: I was absolutely over the moon when my partner surprised me with a luxury watch on our anniversary.

vocab.word: cost an arm and a leg
vocab.example: Although I know that designer watch must have cost an arm and a leg, my parents insisted it was for my graduation.

vocab.meaning: trân trọng điều gì đó suốt đời
vocab.example: The pocket watch my grandfather gave me is something I will treasure for life due to its history.

vocab.meaning: có ý nghĩa vô cùng lớn lao với ai đó
vocab.example: That simple digital watch means the world to me because it was the first gift I ever received from my brother.

vocab.meaning: mãi trường tồn với thời gian
vocab.example: It is a classic analog watch that will surely stand the test of time, both in terms of durability and style.
Since receiving such an expensive gift, I always keep a close eye on my watch to ensure I don't misplace it.
After adjusting the strap, the watch my sister gave me fits like a glove and feels very comfortable.

vocab.meaning: làm ai đó cực kỳ kinh ngạc/ấn tượng
vocab.example: The intricate design of the watch gifted by my mentor completely blew me away.
My best friend gave me a vintage timepiece out of the blue, just to show how much she valued our friendship.

vocab.meaning: vừa kịp lúc (ngay trước khi quá muộn)
vocab.example: I received a new smartwatch in the nick of time, just as my old one finally stopped working before my business trip.
